Instructions for configuring and using Celery with Flask to handle background tasks.

# Purpose
The document provides instructions for setting up and running a background task processing system using Celery with a Flask application. It explains how to configure the environment by creating a virtual environment, installing necessary dependencies, and starting a Celery worker. The document also describes how to run the Flask development server to interact with the application. Users are directed to access the application via a web browser at `http://localhost:5000/`, where they can submit tasks and monitor their progress through browser developer tools and log outputs from both Flask and Celery.
